evals.prompt: Make a title slide for a pitch to Spotify. The presenters are Sandhya Hegde (VP Marketing) and James Park (Solutions Engineer).
evals.expected_output: Title slide with Amplitude Blue background, 'Amplitude & Spotify' headline, two presenter names with titles, date pill, footer

evals.prompt: Add a bullet slide to my deck about what we'll cover today: understanding their activation funnel, identifying drop-off points, reviewing cohort retention, and discussing integration with Snowflake. Use the dark variant. Here's the deck: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/EXAMPLE/edit
evals.expected_output: Content+Bullets slide with black bg, white headline, white card with 4 arrow-bulleted items, vertically centered

assertions.text: Asks for presentation URL before generating

evals.prompt: Create a slide showing our 4 product pillars: Analytics (self-serve insights), Experiment (A/B testing at scale), CDP (unified customer profiles), and Session Replay (visual debugging).
evals.expected_output: Multi-Column Cards slide with 4 columns, each with title, pill, and description. Accent color gradient across columns.

assertions.text: Each card has title, pill, and description

evals.prompt: Make a stat callout slide showing Duolingo's results with Amplitude: 34% increase in lesson completion, 12% improvement in D7 retention, 2.5x faster experiment velocity, and $4.2M attributed revenue lift.
evals.expected_output: Stat/Metric Callout with 4 columns showing the stats with VERIFIED OUTCOME pills and colored stat numbers

assertions.text: VERIFIED OUTCOME pills in accent colors
Stat numbers are large (36pt) in accent colors

evals.prompt: I need a section divider slide that says 'Customer Success Stories'
evals.expected_output: Section divider with Amplitude Blue background, large centered headline, thin divider line below

assertions.text: Footer is present in light blue

evals.prompt: Make a slide comparing the old way vs the Amplitude way. Old way: manual SQL queries for every question, weeks to get experiment results, data scattered across 5 tools, engineers bottleneck analytics. Amplitude way: anyone can answer product questions, experiments run in hours not weeks, single source of truth for user data, self-serve analytics for every team.
evals.expected_output: Two-column text slide with left card (old way) and right card (Amplitude way), each with blue section title and arrow bullets

assertions.text: Each card has blue section title

evals.prompt: Add a customer quote slide. The quote is from Marcus Thompson, Head of Growth at Peloton: 'We went from guessing what drives engagement to knowing exactly which features move the needle. Amplitude changed how our entire product team makes decisions.'
evals.expected_output: Quote slide with black background, blue accent line, white quote text, bold name, grey title

assertions.text: Blue accent line on left side

evals.prompt: Create a slide about our Funnel Analysis feature. Left side should have space for a product screenshot. Right side should list: visual funnel builder with drag-and-drop, real-time conversion tracking by segment, automatic bottleneck detection, and integration with experiment results.
evals.expected_output: Image+Text split slide with grey placeholder on left, blue section title and arrow bullets on right

assertions.text: Left half has grey image placeholder
Right half has blue section title
